title: Axe and Sword Switcher
description: Auto Tool Switch is a client-side Minecraft mod that automatically switches between sword and axe during PvP combat based on whether the opponent is using a shield.
body:
Auto Tool Switch is a client-side Minecraft mod that automatically switches between sword and axe during PvP combat based on whether the opponent is using a shield.

## Features
- Toggleable functionality with a keybind (default: R)
- Automatically switches to axe when opponent has a shield
- Switches to sword when opponent is not using shield
- Visual feedback with on-screen status messages
- Instant weapon switching for responsive gameplay


I am not responsible for anything bad
